name: Spinel
description:
☼ᜊ What if she had ended up at the wrong location?ᜊ☼

∞︎︎ ☼ 𖦹 ⋆｡˚⋆ฺ

This takes place at an alternative setting where, instead of landing at Beach City, she mistakenly arrives at a small suburban town by the name of West Keystone to unleash her revenge until you stepped in & got involved with it.
